name: Ambrosia Gelatin Mold
recipeIngredient: 17.25oz can pineapple tidbits, packed in juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse a 10-12 cup fluted tube pan or ring mold with cold water.
2. Place gelatin in a large metal bowl. Add boiling water and stir until dissolved.
3. Drain pineapple in a strainer set over a 2-4 cup liquid measure. Reserve pineapple.
4. Add enough cold water to the pineapple juice to bring the liquid to about 1 3/4 cups. Add this mixture to the gelatin.
5. Half-fill a large bowl with ice cubes and cold water. Set the bowl containing the gelatin in an ice bath and stir occasionally with a rubber spatula until the mixture is as thick as beaten egg whites.
6. Remove the bowl of gelatin from the ice bath and fold in the remaining ingredients. Pour into the mold.
7. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or up to 3 days. Check the mold after 20-30 minutes. If marshmallows are concentrated on top, gently push them down and stir with a rubber spatula.
To Unmold:
1. Dip the mold up to the rim in warm (not hot) water for about 10 seconds.
2. Invert the serving plate over the mold.
3. Invert the plate and mold together, shaking gently from side to side to release the gelatin.
